name: vggt-omega
summary: Feed-forward camera and point-cloud reconstruction from images or video using VGGT-Omega.
description: Runs VGGT-Omega on an image folder or video file and pushes predicted camera poses plus a point cloud directly into the LichtFeld scene, with optional COLMAP workspace export and train-from-points initialization. Non-commercial / research use only; requires approved Hugging Face access to facebook/VGGT-Omega and local hf auth login.
author: Yehe Liu
